name: Endtest
description: Endtest — No-code test automation platform for web and mobile apps with record-and-playback and visual test editor.

seo.title: Endtest — Test Automation / Device Cloud
seo.meta_description: Endtest: Endtest — No-code test automation platform for web and mobile apps with record-and-playback and visual test editor.

when_to_use: No-code test creation with record-and-playback UI
Cross-browser automated tests without Selenium setup
Mobile web test execution on real device cloud
CI pipeline integration with zero scripting required

pros: No-code recorder for web and mobile suites
cons: Limited escape hatch when logic gets complex
SaaS-only, everything lives in their cloud
Pricing escalates quickly with parallel runs
review.verdict: Reasonable choice when QA is non-technical, but expect the usual low-code ceiling under real load.
review.best_for: QA teams without scripting skills running straightforward web regressions
review.not_for: Engineering-led teams who should invest in Playwright or Cypress instead

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium with no evidence of peak-lock
